page.title: Install blvm
page.lead: Pre-built binaries and Linux packages from GitHub Releases. Each release ships `checksums.sha256` — verify before running.

packageSlots.label: Debian / Ubuntu
packageSlots.description: Ubuntu 22.04+, Debian 11+, and any dpkg-based distro.
packageSlots.installCmdTemplate:
sudo dpkg -i {{FILENAME}}
sudo apt-get install -f    # pull in any missing deps

packageSlots.label: Fedora / RHEL
packageSlots.description: Fedora 38+, RHEL 9, CentOS Stream 9, and RPM-based distros.

packageSlots.label: Linux x86_64
packageSlots.description: Single static binary for 64-bit Linux (glibc). Base release build (`production` features); not the full local `cargo build` default set.

packageSlots.label: ARM64 Linux
packageSlots.description: 64-bit ARM Linux binary (Raspberry Pi 4/5 with 64-bit OS, Apple Silicon Linux VMs, etc.).

packageSlots.label: Windows
packageSlots.description: Portable Windows 10 / 11 build (64-bit). Download, verify against `checksums.sha256`, then run the `.exe` from PowerShell.

docker.title: Docker
docker.description: Official image on GHCR, published on every stable release.

markdownDoc.experimentalVariantSection:
## Experimental build variant {#experimental-variant}

Stable GitHub Releases ship the **base** binary only (`production` Cargo features — see [Release process — Build variants](../development/release-process.md#build-variants)). Extra compile-time features — UTXO commitments, Dandelion++ privacy relay, BIP119 CTV, Stratum V2 integration, sigop counting, Iroh transport, and related flags — require a **source build** with the experimental feature set or explicit `--features`.

## Who is this for?

- **Operators:** [Quick Start](../getting-started/quick-start.md) → [Mainnet initial sync](../getting-started/mainnet-sync.md) or [First Node (regtest)](../getting-started/first-node.md)

- **Researchers:** [Introduction](../introduction.md#who-is-this-for)
